observe_view.prompt:
[Toolbox]
manager: tool_manage (callable)
rule: hidden tools are unavailable.
rule: closed tools are listed here but are not callable.
rule: expanded/pinned tools are callable through the active provider schema.
rule: use tool_manage open/close/pin/unpin/reload to change visibility.
drawer: context_system (collapsed)
drawer rule: context_manage stays under 司; summary / vision / compact open only when the selected context mode authorizes them.
tools:
- [closed] command · Run a one-shot shell command
- [closed] pty_run · Start a PTY terminal session for interactive or long-running terminal work
- [closed] pty_input · Send input into an existing PTY session
- [closed] pty_wait · Register one wait on a PTY session
- [expanded] view_image · Load a local image file and attach it to the current round for visual analysis
- [closed] apply_patch · Apply a Codex-style patch for code edits
- [expanded] update_plan · Visible planning surface with three modes
- [expanded] focus_mode · Enter or exit focus mode directly
- [expanded] memory_check · First-pass locator for long-term memory before deep reading
- [expanded] memory_read · Read long-term memory or externalized output in detail
- [expanded] ask_user · Request structured user input through the inline reconciliation UI and wait for the reply
- [expanded] spawn_agent · Spawn a sub-agent for a well-scoped side task, bounded exploration, or parallel batch work
- [expanded] send_input · Send follow-up instructions, corrections, or extra material to an existing agent
- [expanded] wait_agent · Register one wait on one or more active agents when you need to watch them now
- [expanded] list_agent · List current active sub-agents and their log paths
- [expanded] close_agent · Close one or more agents when they are no longer needed and return their latest status sum…
- [closed] pty_list · List live PTY terminal sessions and their external log metadata
- [closed] pty_kill · Terminate one or more PTY terminal sessions
- [expanded] persona_manage · Controlled ProjectYing persona communication tool
- [closed] server_manage · Server-only control surface for the AI-managed SSH registry
- [closed] server_split · Server-only tool for splitting Server · 御 into a managed 御 network
- [closed] browser · Unified browser tool with two routes
- [expanded] draw_image · Generate or edit a real image through ProjectYing's GPT Image pipeline
- [closed] context_manage · Manage external context, fastmemory, and prompt entries instead of editing context files d…
- [expanded] context_compact · CONTEXT COMPACT · ALL/OLD/FAST
- [expanded] context_summary · Low-receipt context entry folding tool
- [expanded] context_vision · CONTEXT VISION
- [expanded] memory_add · Write long-term datememory entries

tool_entries.reason: default=closed; observe=expanded; provider=yes; callable=yes; declared=yes; governance=auto
default=closed; observe=expanded; provider=yes; callable=yes; declared=yes; governance=auto
